# mcp_playground_flutter

> An interactive AI Agent Playground widget for Flutter — connect to any LLM provider, register local Dart-native tools and remote HTTP MCP servers, and prototype agentic workflows in a chat-based UI.

## Docs

- [Full Documentation for LLMs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lschaffer/mcp_playground/main/llms-full.txt): All documentation inlined in a single file for LLM consumption

## Core Files

- [README.md](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/README.md): Detailed installation instructions, widget API documentation, and usage examples.
- [lib/mcp_playground.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/lib/mcp_playground.dart): Main playground widget and layout container.
- [lib/models.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/lib/models.dart): Configuration schemas (`LlmConfig`, `McpServerConfig`), JSON-RPC 2.0 schemas, and UI chat models.
- [lib/playground_controller.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/lib/playground_controller.dart): State manager orchestrating agent loops, tool executions, and persistence.
- [lib/mcp_client.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/lib/mcp_client.dart): Client for HTTP/HTTPS MCP connections, SSE parsing, and orchestrating multiple active MCP servers.
- [lib/llm_service.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/lib/llm_service.dart): Provider integrations with Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, and custom endpoints.
- [lib/local_tools.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/lib/local_tools.dart): Dart-native local fallback tools (e.g. Weather, SSH, and Chart-generation).

## Implementation Examples

- [example/lib/main.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/example/lib/main.dart): Showcase application containing pre-configured local tools and local stdio MCP servers (Git, Filesystem).
- [pubspec.yaml](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/pubspec.yaml): Project dependencies and configuration.
